headings.usage: Use for all dashboard page titles, card headers, and large metric numbers. Provides an authoritative, crisp look.

body.usage: Use for all data tables, logs, input labels, tooltips, and body text. Highly legible for dense data.

accent.usage: Action buttons (NFC scan, Add vehicle, Authorize fuel).

grids_and_layouts.dashboard_grid: High Density Grid. Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
grids_and_layouts.widget_ratios: Summary: col-span-1. Primary Chart: col-span-2 or col-span-3. List/Feed: col-span-1 row-span-2.
grids_and_layouts.padding: Generous padding inside containers. Use p-6 or p-8 inside cards to prevent text collision.

surface_strategies.cards: Grid Borders: Expose the skeleton. Data-heavy dashboards use flat backgrounds with 1px subtle borders (border-border), max 8px border-radius, no shadow by default. Hover: slight lift, subtle shadow.
surface_strategies.modals: Solid backgrounds with sharp borders and subtle backdrop-blur for overlays.
surface_strategies.headers: Solid background (never fully transparent) with a hard bottom border for fixed or sticky navigation headers. Ensure z-50.

components.buttons: Slightly rounded (max 8px). High contrast on hover (hover:bg-blue-700 hover:text-white). Active state must clearly show.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Never use native html inputs.
components.tables: Dense rows. Left-align text, right-align numbers. Subtle hover states on rows (hover:bg-slate-50).
components.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn charts. Use monospace fonts for numeric axes.
components.toasts: Use Sonner for alerts (e.g., Fraud alert, NFC scan success, offline sync).

motion.entrance: Staggered entrance animations for list items.
motion.nfc_scan: Pulsing animation (animate-pulse) for the NFC scanning state/modal.

accessibility.contrast: Text must meet WCAG AA (4.5:1 ratio). Ensure hover/focus states have higher contrast.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based. Example: data-testid='nfc-scan-button'.

visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for dense data clarity.
visual_enhancers.empty_states: Do not show blank charts; display a Call to Action (CTA) or subtle illustration.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load fonts (Manrope, IBM Plex Sans) via Google Fonts in index.html or define in CSS.
Install Recharts for analytics visualization: `yarn add recharts`
Install Sonner for toast notifications: `yarn add sonner`
Use standard HTML `div` with Tailwind classes for layout structures instead of abstract wrapper components.
For the NFC Flow, simulate a real-time interaction: start with an idle state, show a pulsing/scanning animation when 'reading', then transition to success/validation view.
Place the North Star Metric (e.g., Total Fuel Consumption or Critical Alerts) at the top-left of the Dashboard.
In the Executive Dashboard, prioritize actionable data over decoration. Use progressive disclosure: show summaries first, details on click.
Customize Shadcn components heavily: remove default vercel looks by adjusting border-radius to 8px max and using 1px solid borders.
Ensure offline PWA capabilities are minimally mocked or structured if actual service workers aren't fully implemented in this phase.
Do NOT use HTML <input type='date'> or <select>. Always use Shadcn's specific robust components.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Do not center align the app container in App.css (.App { text-align: center; } must be removed if it exists).
Never use AI assistant emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, transition, staggered entrance).
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical to avoid cramped UI.
Never use transparent backgrounds on headers or dropdowns. If content scrolls underneath, use Solid Background or Crystal Glass (backdrop-blur-xl).
Prioritize optical alignment over geometrical alignment.
No generic full-screen gradients. Focus on solid colors with high contrast typography.
Use Sonner for toasts located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
